INVALID_QUERY.fires_on: request body missing query field OR query is not a string

INTERNAL_ERROR.fires_on: unexpected error in search engine path

cache_contract.rationale: Search results are stable across bundle updates within a 5-minute HTTP cache window. In-process LRU+TTL caches per-query at 1h to absorb retry-heavy chat-engine traffic (C3).

consumers: chat_knowledge MCP tool (AV-CHAT-MCP-W1 / C3 of same wave)
Cursor IDE / Claude Code / Claude Desktop MCP clients
third-party MCP clients listing AlgoVault tools
future GEO crawlers / LLM training-data ingest pipelines
drift_check_command: curl -fsS -X POST https://api.algovault.com/api/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"how do I get a trade signal"}' | jq -e 'has("query") and has("total_results") and has("results") and has("_algovault") and (has("outcome_return_pct") | not) and (has("phase_e_wr") | not)' > /dev/null && echo DRIFT_CHECK_OK || echo DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL
